meaning: to bring to justice; to punish according to the law
sentence: 造假的商家必须依法法办。
pinyin: Zào jiǎ de shāngjiā bìxū yīfǎ fǎbàn.
english: Merchants who sell counterfeit goods must be brought to justice.

meaning: to put on theatrical makeup; (neologism c. 2014) to debunk sb's claim;
sentence: 他刚说不会输，结果第一局就输了，真打脸。
pinyin: Tā gāng shuō bù huì shū, jiéguǒ dì yī jú jiù shū le, zhēn dǎliǎn.
english: He just said he wouldn't lose, then lost the very first round — talk about putting egg on his face.

sentence: 洪灾期间军民团结一致抗洪。
pinyin: Hóng zāi qījiān jūn mín tuánjié yīzhì kàng hóng.
english: During the flood, soldiers and civilians united to fight the disaster.

meaning: lit. true religion; orthodox religion; orthodox Christianity; Islam (i
sentence: 东正教在俄罗斯有很大影响力。
pinyin: Dōngzhèngjiào zài Éluósī yǒu hěn dà yǐngxiǎnglì.
english: Orthodox Christianity has great influence in Russia.

sentence: 他名头很大，但实力一般。
pinyin: Tā míng tóu hěn dà, dàn shílì yībān.
english: He has a big reputation, but his actual ability is just average.
